user.title: Menstrual Cycle Tracker Setup
user.description: Set up your cycle tracker below. To improve prediction accuracy, enter up to 3 past periods. The more history you provide, the better the predictions will be. Enter your most recent period first at the top, then work backwards. All date fields are optional — leave them blank to skip.

data_description.name: A name for this tracker (e.g. My Cycle). You can create separate trackers for different people.
data_description.date_format: Select the format you prefer for entering and displaying dates.
data_description.cycle1_start: The first day you started bleeding during your most recent period.
data_description.cycle1_end: The last day of bleeding for that period. Leave blank if it is still ongoing.
data_description.cycle2_start: The first day of bleeding for the period before that.
data_description.cycle2_end: The last day of bleeding for that period.
data_description.cycle3_start: The first day of bleeding for your third most recent period.
data_description.cycle3_end: The last day of bleeding for that period.

error.end_without_start: An end date was provided without a start date. Please enter the start date first.
error.end_before_start: The end date must be after the start date.

log_period_start.name: Log Period Start
log_period_start.description: Log the start of a menstrual period.

tracker.name: Tracker
tracker.description: Select the tracker to log to.

date.name: Date
date.description: Date the period started (in your configured date format).

log_period_end.name: Log Period End
log_period_end.description: Log the end of a menstrual period.

tracker.name: Tracker
tracker.description: Select the tracker to log to.

date.name: Date
date.description: Date the period ended (in your configured date format).

log_symptom.name: Log Symptom
log_symptom.description: Log a symptom associated with the cycle.

tracker.name: Tracker
tracker.description: Select the tracker to log to.

symptom.name: Symptom
symptom.description: Name of the symptom (e.g. cramps, headache, fatigue).

date.name: Date
date.description: Date of the symptom (in your configured date format).

edit_cycle.name: Edit Cycle
edit_cycle.description: Edit an existing cycle's start or end date.

original_start_date.name: Original Start Date
original_start_date.description: The current start date of the cycle to edit (in your configured format).

new_start_date.name: New Start Date
new_start_date.description: New start date for the cycle. Leave blank to keep unchanged.

new_end_date.name: New End Date
new_end_date.description: New end date for the cycle. Leave blank to keep unchanged.

start_date.name: Start Date
start_date.description: The start date of the cycle to delete.

date.name: Date
date.description: The date the symptom was logged.

symptom.name: Symptom
symptom.description: The name of the symptom to delete.
